title: calamus calapparius
intro: Calamus calapparius is a type of plant commonly known as the 'Rough Calamus' or 'Indian Calamus', which is a rhizomatous plant that belongs to the Acorus family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of calamus calapparius include its ability to relieve digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Calamus calapparius is commonly used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, decoctions, and essential oils, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and health.
